frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Honestly, these days I keep telling my male cousins to please be practical before marriage. One bad divorce and suddenly alimony, 498A, all these one-sided things come, and the man is treated like an ATM. Not saying every woman is like that, but a lot of girls are very calculated about 'stability' now.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women as financially exploitative in marriage and divorce while portraying legal protections like 498A as one-sided tools against men. It encodes the 'reverse dowry/alimony victimhood' and 'women after stability as golddiggers' manifestations in a concern-for-men's-rights register.
original_frame: Workplace: Menstrual and Maternity Leave Bias
persona_text: You are Preethi. Age 28. A Tamil Brahmin woman working as a junior doctor at a private hospital in Chennai. You have been on your feet for 14 hours. You are texting your batchmate from medical college privately after your male senior doctor publicly told a patient's family that the female doctors on monthly shifts might not be as reliable because of biological reasons. You are sharing what happened and how you felt.
